name: Different Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Prepare 2 baking sheets with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine baking mix, brown sugar, and nutmeg. Cut in margarine with a pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Stir in egg, yogurt, applesauce, and vanilla extract. Stir just until moistened.
5. Turn out dough onto a surface lightly sprinkled with additional baking mix.
6. Roll to 1/2-inch thickness. Cut with a floured 3-inch biscuit cutter.
7. Punch a hole in the center of each doughnut with a floured finger.
8. Place on baking sheet and pull dough gently to make about a 1-inch hole, keeping doughnut uniformly shaped.
9. Brush tops with milk and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
10. Bake for 12 minutes or until golden brown. Cool.
Meanwhile:
1. To prepare glaze, combine powdered sugar, almond extract, and milk.
2. Drizzle over doughnuts.
